body: Wolverines practice tonight 6:30 at Rouge Park Field 3. Bring water.
Game Saturday 9 AM vs the Eagles, Rouge Park. Be there by 8:30.
Reminder: team banquet Nov 14. RSVP to Coach Terry.
Practice moved to Thursday 6:30 — Tuesday's rained out.
Bring your jersey Saturday, league photos before the game.
Make-up game Sunday 1 PM vs Dearborn. Carpool from the hall.
Great win today, Wolverines. Rest up, practice Tuesday.
Field's wet — practice canceled tonight. See you Thursday.
Game vs the Hawks moved to Field 2. Same 9 AM start.
Uniform pickup is Friday 5-7 at the union hall. Don't miss it.
Snack duty this Saturday is the Coleman family. Thanks!
Playoff seeding game Saturday — win and we're in. Bring it.
Equipment drop-off after the game, leave bats with Coach Ray.
Team photo retake is Wednesday before practice. Full jerseys.
Carpool leaves the hall at 7:45 for the Dearborn away game.
Fundraiser car wash Saturday 10-2. All hands, parents welcome.
No practice Monday — Memorial weekend. Back Wednesday 6:30.
Lineup posted in the dugout. Check your spot before warmups.
Last game of the season Saturday. Banquet sign-up at the field.
Rain delay — we'll decide by 8 AM. Watch your phone.
Bring $5 for league umpire fees Saturday if you haven't paid.
Coach Ray's running fielding drills tonight. Cleats required.
Tigers game outing for the team is set — details Sunday.
Welcome to the Wolverines! First practice is next Tuesday 6:30.
Running late. Board meeting ran long. Home by 6.
Pick up milk on your way. Sweet tea too.
Ruth called, she's fine. Just wanted to hear a voice.
Practice cancelled tonight, field wet. Home early.
Marcus called about the truck insurance card. Send it when you can.
Jasmine texted, she's driving up Saturday morning.
Coffee ready when you get up. Two miles at 6:15?
Church anniversary meeting was long but productive.
Deacon board Sunday will be short, meat sandwiches at home after.
Pastor asked about the picnic pavilion, told him I'd handle it.
Field is at Rouge Park, main entrance off Outer Drive.
Bring a jacket. Detroit is colder than Chicago right now.
Church starts at 8:30 sharp, we'll save you a seat.
Grandma Ruth wants to see you Sunday afternoon.
Mom made sweet potato pie for you, don't forget to grab a slice.
Drive safe. Text me when you cross Kalamazoo.
Practice tonight 6:30 Rouge Park Field 3. Bring water.
Wolverines game Saturday 9 AM. Weather looks clear.
Ashvale spring break, come home. Mom needs a hug.
Move-in day set. Mom's already got the list.
Check in when you land back on campus.
Insurance card on the kitchen counter, in the blue folder.
Coming by after work Ma. Bringing the mail.
Denise sent collards, I'll bring them by.
Doctor visit Tuesday, I'll take you.
Lawn's cut Ma, watered the tomatoes too.
Dominoes Saturday at your place or mine?
Fire's going, come by. Old Faithful's happy.
Church anniversary Oct 17, save the date brother.
Rouge Park lot 4 Saturday, gates open at 8:30.
Wolverines practice tonight 6:30 at Rouge Park Field 3. Bring water and cleats.
Game Saturday 9 AM vs Panthers. Rouge Park Field 3. Be there by 8:30 for warm-up.
Reminder: parent volunteer sign-ups on ClipboardApp. Two more concessions slots.
Field wet, practice moved to indoor cages at Metro Sports Complex.
Uniforms in tomorrow. Coach Raymond will hand them out at practice.
Team photo day Saturday before the 9 AM game. Full uniform.
Banquet Nov 14. RSVP by end of week. Coach Raymond has the form.
Rainout tonight. Next practice Thursday same time.
Wolverines batting cage tonight 6:30. Bring your own bat.
Coach reminder: sportsmanship on and off the field. That's the standard.
End of season banquet Nov 14 at Local 247 hall. Family invited.
Fundraiser applesauce delivery Saturday after game.
Season opener Apr 4. Roster locked Wed. Confirm status.
Reminder: field ready at 8 AM Saturday for the Bulldogs game.
